svg.text: Multi-Region Active-Active Kafka on Confluent Cloud
Interface type, 3 ENIs in private subnets
Private subnet AZ-a | t3.small | Amazon Linux 2023 | 30min auto-stop
3 SSM Endpoints (ssm, ssmmessages, ec2messages) | Cross-VPC SG | IAM Profile
Egress: East CIDR + West CIDR + HTTPS 0.0.0.0/0
Route53 Zone Association: West PL Zone → East VPC (Cloud9 resolves West endpoints)
Route53 Zone Association: East PL Zone → West VPC
1. VPCs + 12 Subnets + 2 IGWs + 2 NATs + 4 Route Tables
2. VPC Peering + 4 Cross-Region Routes + DNS Resolution
3. 3 SSM Endpoints + Cloud9 + Cross-VPC SG + IAM Profile
4. Confluent Environment + 2 Networks + 2 PL Access Grants
5. 2 DEDICATED Kafka Clusters (1 CKU each, ~25 min)
6. 2 PrivateLink VPC Endpoints + 2 SGs + Route53 Zones + DNS
Output: cloud9_url, cluster IDs, API keys, phase2.env (all values for Phase 2)
1. Open Cloud9 IDE (URL from Phase 1 output)
